proof:
calc
have h : constApproxError2 u0 u1 c = p0ProjectionResidualSq2 u0 u1 + 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by
  unfold p0ProjectionResidualSq2 constApproxError2 cellAverage2
  ring
have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ 2 * (cellAverage2 u0 u1 - c) ^ 2 := by
  nlinarith
nlinarith

unfold p0Projection2Left p0Projection2Right cellAverage2
field_simp
ring

unfold weightedP0Average
  congr 1
  · calc
      (∑ i ∈ s, m i * (c * u i)) = (∑ i ∈ s, c * (m i * u i)) := by
        refine Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i hi => ?_
        ring
      _ = c * (∑ i ∈ s, m i * u i) := by rw [Finset.mul_sum]
  · rfl

unfold laxFriedrichsStep
have hsum : laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl = 1 := laxFriedrichsWeights_sum cfl
have hnonneg := laxFriedrichsWeights_nonneg cfl hcflLower hcflUpper
rcases hnonneg with ⟨hwL_nonneg, hwR_nonneg⟩
have hL_abs : |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| = laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| := by
  calc
    |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| = |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl| * |uLeft| := abs_mul _ _
    _ = laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| := by rw [abs_of_nonneg hwL_nonneg]
have hR_abs : |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| = laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| := by
  calc
    |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| = |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl| * |uRight| := abs_mul _ _
    _ = laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| := by rw [abs_of_nonneg hwR_nonneg]
have hL_bound : laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| ≤ laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * M :=
  mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hLeft hwL_nonneg
have hR_bound : laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| ≤ laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * M :=
  mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hRight hwR_nonneg
have hsum_bound : laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| ≤ (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by
  calc
    laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft| + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight| ≤ (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * M) + (laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * M) := add_le_add hL_bound hR_bound
    _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := by ring
calc
  |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| ≤ |laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * uLeft| + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := abs_add_le _ _
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft|) + |laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * uRight| := by rw [hL_abs]
  _ = (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl * |uLeft|) + (laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl * |uRight|) := by rw [hR_abs]
  _ ≤ (laxFriedrichsLeftWeight cfl + laxFriedrichsRightWeight cfl) * M := hsum_bound
  _ = M := by rw [hsum, one_mul]

unfold heatLeftWeight heatCenterWeight heatRightWeight
constructor
· exact hr0
constructor
· linarith
· exact hr0

have h : kdvCanonicalFlux (fun _ => c) = (fun _ => 3 * c ^ 2) := by
    ext i; exact kdvCanonicalFlux_const c i
  rw [h]
  exact fluxDifference_const_zero (3 * c ^ 2) i

unfold vec2InfNorm diag2First diag2Second
apply max_le
· calc
|a * x| = |a| * |x| := abs_mul a x
_ ≤ rho * |x| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ha (abs_nonneg x)
_ ≤ rho * max |x| |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_max_left _ _) hrho
· calc
|b * y| = |b| * |y| := abs_mul b y
_ ≤ rho * |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hb (abs_nonneg y)
_ ≤ rho * max |x| |y| := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_max_right _ _) hrho

unfold finiteRowApply
rw [← Finset.sum_mul, hsum]
simp

unfold finiteDC centeredSignal finiteMean
simp only [Finset.sum_sub_distrib, Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul]
field_simp [hcard]
ring
